samples.xml_description:
Implement an 8-bit multiplier based on shifting and adding. 8-bit input operand A (multiplicand). 8-bit input operand B (multiplier). 16-bit output for the product. shifts[3:0] A

Initialize shifts to 0.

Shifts is a counter from 0 to 8, controlled by valid_count.

Reset shifts to 0.

When valid_count is high, increment shifts by 1 on each clock cycle.

After shifts reaches 8, reset shifts to 0.
